If you see ghav gehra ho, badbu/maggot ho, bleeding ho, ya pashu bahut sust ho, act quickly. Do not give medicines, injections, doses, cutting, puncturing, oil drenching, or force-feeding on your own. Contact a vet, trained animal health worker, Pashu Sakhi, or dairy cooperative when reachable.
